generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi equipped with sensors for real-time environmental monitoring including CO2, particulate matter, humidity, and temperature for indoor air quality management."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseEmbeddedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded sensor within greenhouse for climate control monitoring temperature."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseEmbeddedHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded sensor within greenhouse for climate control monitoring humidity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseEmbeddedLightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded sensor within greenhouse for climate control monitoring light intensity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseLightDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCraneEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder sensor for position measurement of gantry crane's movable components (trolley, bridge, hoist)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCraneLoadCellSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load cell sensor for measuring payload weight on gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCraneLoadDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCraneIMUSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IMU sensor for measuring acceleration and orientation of gantry crane components."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCraneIMUDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor
]

instance GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseEmbeddedTemperatureSensor
]

instance GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseEmbeddedHumiditySensor
]

instance GreenhouseLightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseEmbeddedLightSensor
]

instance GantryCranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneEncoderSensor
]

instance GantryCraneLoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneLoadCellSensor
]

instance GantryCraneIMUDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneIMUSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance AirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for structural and functional representation of air quality management system."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AirQualityEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseClimateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation model for greenhouse climate control using prerecorded data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GreenhouseEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model of gantry crane using Denavit-Hartenberg parameters for forward/inverse kinematics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryCraneEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control system model for real-time actuation and closed-loop control of gantry crane kinematics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryCraneEnabler
]

instance AirQualitySensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data from Raspberry Pi air quality sensors including CO2, particulate matter, humidity, and temperature."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AirQualityEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data from greenhouse embedded sensors including temperature, humidity, and light intensity."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted, GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted, GreenhouseLightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GreenhouseEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time state measurements of gantry crane including position, velocity, acceleration, and payload weight."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryCranePositionDataTransmitted, GantryCraneLoadDataTransmitted, GantryCraneIMUDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryCraneEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneHistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical time-series data of crane state measurements for retrospective analysis and fault detection."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryCraneEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance AirQualityEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for cloud-assisted runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction of air quality management."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityVisualizationService, AirQualityPredictionService
]

instance GreenhouseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Virtual machines with prerecorded data and InfluxDB for time-series data storage in greenhouse climate control."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService, GreenhouseDataLoggingService
]

instance GantryCraneEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS for sensor data aggregation, MATLAB/Simulink for control system simulation, and TimescaleDB for time-series storage."
    DTDFVocab:enables GantryCraneOptimalControlService, GantryCraneContinuousValidationService, GantryCraneFaultDetectionService
]

instance GantryCraneSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Gazebo or CoppeliaSim for physics-based simulation of crane dynamics including collision detection and actuator saturation."
    DTDFVocab:enables GantryCraneSimulationService
]

instance GantryCraneVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Three.js or Unity for 3D interactive visualization of crane motion with CAD model overlays."
    DTDFVocab:enables GantryCraneVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance AirQualityVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of indoor air quality metrics (CO2, particulate matter) for situational awareness."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityVisualizationInsight
]

instance AirQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Time-series forecasting and predictive analytics for air quality degradation."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityPredictionInsight
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of greenhouse climate control based on real-time sensor data and prerecorded behavioral models."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseAdaptationInsight
]

instance GreenhouseDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structured storage and querying of greenhouse environmental data with high temporal resolution."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseDataInsight
]

instance GantryCraneOptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment of control parameters (PID tuning, MPC design) based on kinematic model deviations and operational constraints."
    DTDFVocab:provides GantryCraneControlInsight, GantryCraneTrajectoryOptimizationAction
]

instance GantryCraneContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison between Digital Twin predictions and physical measurements using statistical methods and physics-based residuals."
    DTDFVocab:provides GantryCraneValidationInsight
]

instance GantryCraneFaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection and root-cause analysis for hardware/software faults using supervised/unsupervised learning."
    DTDFVocab:provides GantryCraneFaultInsight
]

instance GantryCraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Physics-based simulation of crane dynamics for collision detection and actuator saturation testing."
    DTDFVocab:provides GantryCraneSimulationInsight
]

instance GantryCraneVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of crane motion with CAD overlays and dynamic annotations."
    DTDFVocab:provides GantryCraneVisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance AirQualityVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard displaying indoor air quality metrics with configurable thresholds and event-driven alerts."
]

instance AirQualityPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted air quality degradation trends based on time-series data and machine learning models."
]

instance GreenhouseAdaptationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to greenhouse climate control parameters based on behavioral adaptation models."
]

instance GreenhouseDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Queryable metadata and statistical analysis of greenhouse environmental data for process optimization."
]

instance GantryCraneControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized control parameters for crane kinematics with real-time adjustments for unmodeled dynamics."
]

instance GantryCraneTrajectoryOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated trajectory planning to minimize energy consumption or cycle time."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GantryCraneValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison results between Digital Twin predictions and physical measurements with automated flagging of inconsistencies."
]

instance GantryCraneFaultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected hardware/software faults with root-cause analysis and fault localization."
]

instance GantryCraneSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Physics-based simulation results including collision detection and actuator saturation warnings."
]

instance GantryCraneVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of crane motion with dynamic annotations and time-series plots."
]

// C1: System Under Study
instance LabScaleGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale mechanical gantry crane with movable components (hoist, trolley, bridge) for material handling in controlled environment."
    base:isContainedIn GantryCranePhysicalSystem
]

instance GantryCranePhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory setting with constrained motion ranges, low payload capacity, and deterministic environmental conditions."
]

instance GantryCraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Embedded or external hardware/software responsible for real-time actuation, sensor data acquisition, and closed-loop control."
    base:isContainedIn GantryCranePhysicalSystem
]

instance GantryCraneDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital representation of lab-scale gantry crane with kinematic and control models for real-time synchronization."
]

instance GantryCraneSystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system for research and educational purposes."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment GantryCranePhysicalSystem
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** in this system is mediated by the **Control Application**, which translates digital commands into physical actions for the **Physical Crane**. **Command types** include trajectory setpoints (generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**) and manual overrides via the **Human Machine Interface (HMI)**. **Control message formats** are not explicitly detailed but are assumed to be structured payloads (e.g., JSON or binary) transmitted via the **Physical Crane Interface** to the crane controllers. **Validation and authentication** mechanisms are not described, though the **Continuous Validation Service** implicitly ensures command fidelity by comparing simulated vs. executed trajectories. **Feedback systems** rely on the **Logging Application**, which streams real-time state data back to the Digital Twin for closed-loop control. **Conflict resolution** is not explicitly addressed, but the **Control Application** likely prioritizes higher-authority commands (e.g., trajectory overrides from the **Trajectory Generator** over manual HMI inputs). **Command execution confirmation** is inferred via the **Continuous Validation Service**, which flags discrepancies between planned and actual trajectories, triggering operator alerts via the **Dashboard** (Grafana)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system exemplars exhibit an **ad-hoc orchestration pattern** with **loose coupling** between components, avoiding commercial digital twin frameworks. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar relies on a **hybrid architecture** combining:
  - **InfluxDB** (time-series database) for structured data storage,
  - **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for asynchronous event-driven communication,
  - **Virtual Machines (VMs)** with prerecorded data for offline behavioral adaptation.
  The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses a **Microsoft Azure-based pipeline** with **AutomationML** for model-driven engineering, integrating **Raspberry Pi sensor data** into a **cloud-hosted digital twin** for runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction. Both exemplars emphasize **domain-specific orchestration** (agricultural/construction) with **containerization/virtualization** for reproducibility. The **lab-scale gantry crane** (logistics/CPS domain) follows a similar **ad-hoc approach**, leveraging the **C4 Model** for architecture visualization but lacks explicit details on **resource management** or **system-wide coordination protocols**. No mention of **service meshes, microservices orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes), or standardized Digital Twin constellations** (e.g., OMG DTF) is provided."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral fidelity**, where both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin dynamically adjust based on real-time feedback. Validation is implied through **prerecorded data** in virtual machine images, though explicit methods (e.g., verification protocols) are not detailed. The **Air Quality Management** system focuses on **model-driven engineering** for high-fidelity digital twin representations, with **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** applications serving as validation mechanisms. Uncertainty quantification is not explicitly addressed, but the use of **AutomationML** suggests structured model validation. Error detection/correction is inferred via **real-time synchronization** between physical sensors and digital models, with **Microsoft Azure tools** potentially enabling cloud-based anomaly detection. Quality assurance processes are ad-hoc, relying on **containerization/virtualization** for reproducibility. The **gantry crane** system lacks fidelity/validity specifics but aligns with the broader **C4 Model-driven architecture**, implying modular validation through software-hardware integration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin’s technical connection** infrastructure leverages a **service-oriented architecture** with the following key elements:
  - **Communication Protocols**: Implicitly includes **MQTT** (via the **MQTT Broker**) for lightweight, publish-subscribe messaging between services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator** → **Control Application**). Other protocols (e.g., TCP/IP for database access) are assumed but not specified.
  - **Network Topology**: A **star topology** centered on the **MQTT Broker**, with services (e.g., **Simulation Service**, **Dashboard**) subscribing to relevant topics. The **Database** (TimescaleDB) is likely accessed via direct connections from services.
  - **Bandwidth/Latency**: Critical for real-time operations; the **Trajectory Generator** and **Continuous Validation Service** require **low-latency** (<100ms) communication to ensure trajectory accuracy. The **Logging Application** may tolerate slightly higher latency for non-critical data.
  - **Reliability/Redundancy**: Not explicitly detailed, but the **Continuous Validation Service** implies fault tolerance by detecting and alerting on trajectory deviations. Redundancy mechanisms (e.g., backup MQTT brokers) are not mentioned.
  - **Security Protocols**: Not specified, though the use of a **TimescaleDB** (with potential authentication) and **MQTT** (which can support TLS) suggests basic security measures are in place. No encryption or access control details are provided."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin’s hosting and deployment** infrastructure is **on-premise** (co-located with the **Physical Crane**), as implied by the lack of cloud references and the real-time constraints of the system. Key details include:
  - **Hosting Platform**: Local servers or edge devices running the six Digital Twin containers (**Database**, **Dashboard**, **Trajectory Generator Service**, etc.), with the **Physical Crane Interface** and **Control Application** likely deployed on the same network.
  - **Computational Requirements**: The **Trajectory Generator Service** and **Simulation Service** require sufficient CPU/GPU resources to model crane kinematics and simulate trajectories in real time. The **Continuous Validation Service** demands low-latency processing for distance metric calculations.
  - **Storage Requirements**: The **TimescaleDB** stores time-series data (e.g., crane states, trajectories) with high write throughput from the **Logging Application**. No specific storage capacity is mentioned.
  - **Scalability Mechanisms**: Not explicitly addressed, but the modular **container-based architecture** (C4 Model) suggests horizontal scaling could be implemented by replicating services (e.g., additional **Trajectory Generator** instances).
  - **Deployment Models**: Primarily **monolithic deployment** for the Digital Twin (all containers co-located), though the **container abstraction** (C4 Model) implies potential for microservices-based scaling. **Availability/Redundancy Assurance**: Implicit via the **Continuous Validation Service**, which ensures operational integrity by monitoring trajectory fidelity. No high-availability clustering or failover mechanisms are described."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin exemplars demonstrate **limited but domain-specific horizontal integration** with external systems:
  - **GreenhouseDT**: Integrates with **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for internal data exchange, but no explicit **interoperability standards** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) or **enterprise system dependencies** are mentioned. The use of **virtual machines with prerecorded data** suggests **offline-capable** operation with minimal external integration.
  - **Air Quality Management**: Leverages **AutomationML** for **model-driven digital twin engineering** and **Microsoft Azure tools** for cloud-based pipeline execution, implying integration with **Azure IoT services** or **Azure Data Lake** for large-scale data processing. The exemplar’s **Raspberry Pi sensor layer** may interface with **standard IoT protocols** (e.g., MQTT, HTTP), but specifics are omitted. No mention of **cross-Digital Twin integration** (e.g., federated twins) or **enterprise ERP/MES systems**.
  - **Lab-scale gantry crane**: No details on **external system integration** are provided beyond its **C4 Model architecture visualization**. The context implies a **cyber-physical systems (CPS) focus**, but dependencies on **logistics software (e.g., WMS, TMS)** or **industrial protocols (e.g., PROFINET)** are not documented.
  The exemplars collectively avoid **standardized interoperability frameworks**, relying instead on **ad-hoc, domain-specific integrations** with minimal cross-system dependencies."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems exhibit partial adherence to **industry standards and interoperability frameworks**, with the following specifics:
  - **AutomationML**: The *Air Quality Management* exemplar explicitly uses **AutomationML** for Digital Twin representation, a **standardized modeling language** for automation and control systems (IEC 62714). This ensures interoperability with other engineering tools and systems.
  - **Cloud Platforms**: The *Air Quality Management* exemplar leverages **Microsoft Azure tools**, which may align with **Azure-specific standards** (e.g., Azure IoT Hub for device connectivity, Azure Digital Twins for framework-level standardization). However, no broader **industry certification** (e.g., ISO 23247 for Digital Twins) is mentioned.
  - **Open-Source Dissemination**: All exemplars are hosted on **GitHub**, suggesting compliance with **open-source licensing** (e.g., MIT, Apache) and **version control standards** (Git). This facilitates reproducibility but does not guarantee adherence to proprietary Digital Twin frameworks.
  - **Interoperability**: The use of **message brokers (ActiveMQ)** and **time-series databases (InfluxDB)** in *GreenhouseDT* indicates adherence to **open protocols** (e.g., AMQP for messaging, InfluxDB Line Protocol for data ingestion). However, no explicit **standardized APIs** (e.g., OPC UA, FIWARE) are referenced for cross-system communication.
  - **Domain-Specific Standards**: The *Air Quality Management* exemplar targets **construction engineering** and **virus spread prevention**, which may involve **building automation standards** (e.g., ASHRAE 62.1 for ventilation) or **health/safety regulations** (e.g., WHO guidelines), though these are not explicitly cited in the documents."
]
